# Third-party dependencies

This folder contains external libraries and assets used by the app. They are vendored here so the site works offline and without a CDN.

## JavaScript (`js/`)

| File | Package | Version | License |
|------|---------|---------|---------|
| `js/jspdf.umd.min.js` | [jsPDF](https://github.com/parallax/jsPDF) | 2.5.2 | MIT |

Used by the **Create PDF** tab to export a landscape A4 print sheet.

## Fonts

The `fonts/` subdirectory holds web fonts for poster typography. See `fonts/LICENSE.txt` for license details (SIL Open Font License 1.1).

| File | Family |
|------|--------|
| `ArchivoNarrow-Variable.woff2` | Archivo Narrow |
| `LibreFranklin-Variable.woff2` | Libre Franklin |
| `WorkSans-Variable.woff2` | Work Sans |
